message:
refactor(_sre_mod): Use h.c(), h.I32(), h.I64() factories

Replace 14 constant generator functions with factory pattern:
- h.I32() for codesize, magic constants
- h.I64() for start, end indices
- h.c() for null/empty returns (match, search, groups, etc.)

Reduces file from 145 to 87 lines (-58 lines).
